name: python3-nmap
title: python3-nmap
summary: Python3 interface to the Nmap port scanner
description:
Python3 interface to the Nmap port scanner
It helps manipulating nmap scan results and can
be useful to systems administrators to
automate scanning task and reports.
It also supports nmap script outputs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-nmap because Python3 interface to the Nmap port scanner.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-nmap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-nmap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-nmap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
